subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Beauty of the All-Glorious! In this most bounteous Cycle and this mighty Age, strive thou to gain an abundant share [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق جمال ذوالجلال در این کور کریم و دور عظیم بکوش که نصیب اوفر بری و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @bringing forth results; fruit, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
